feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Technology Platform
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Technology Platform Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Custom tile App working in Development but not in Acceptance.
entry.content:
I have created a custom Tile chip in development system using the below reference link:

Create and use custom tile type - SAP Community

now its working in Development system PRD Travel Sheet

 

in Acceptance system it's not working.

can anyone please helping to resolve on this issue.

entry.title: SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP)/ more than one global account
entry.content: We have two separate global accounts in SAP Business Technology Platform(BTP): One for SAP Cloud ALM and the other for all other BTP services in BTP (application development, CPI etc). Is it possible to move the SAP Cloud ALM sub-account to the other global account so that we have only one global account?

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP)/ more than one...
entry.content: No, this cannot be done. SAP Cloud ALM always needs an own global account. A global account in SAP BTP is the realization of a contract you made with SAP. When you have requested your SAP Cloud ALM tenant, you have signed the order form. From the legal point of view, this is a separate contract and requires a separate global account.

entry.title: Thesis Topics - SAP BTP
entry.content:
I am thinking of doing my Master thesis on SAP BTP. There are lot of a wide range of services available. What kind of topics would be better? Any suggestions. I am having some ideas,

1. Evaluating the development approach in Abap-Cloud using eclipse and comparing it with traditional abap development. 

2. Devops capabilities in BTP environment.

3. Infrastructure monitoring optimization - BTP.  Would love to hear your opinion or any new ideas for the thesis project?

entry.title: SAP Digital Manufacturing: Embed Digital Manufacturing in Custom Web Apps
entry.content:
One of the key features that sets SAP Digital Manufacturing (DM) apart is its flexibility in integration.
In addition to the extensibility options within Digital Manufacturing it is also possible to embed SAP DM in your own custom web applications. 

Context:

"To prevent clickjacking or overlay attacks, web browsers follow a same origin policy. The same origin policy means you can only embedded content in your web page if the content shares the same protocol, host, and port as your web page. If the origins don't match, you must maintain a list of origins that allows for exceptions to the same origin policy." Trusted Domains

It is recommended to instead ensure that your application runs under the same domain as the framing application.

Prerequisites:

Before getting started please review the security implications of using inline frames (IFrames) with your Apps. This post only describes the procedure for embedding SAP DM itself - so only for a User that is already logged in. To enable embedding also for the login process it is necessary to also consider the login page of the identity provider. Not all identity providers support framing. Help

Procedure:

  1. Go to your subaccount and choose Security Settings.
  2. Choose Add
  3. Enter the host name for the trusted domain.
    For example: https://custom.exampleapp.com

Save your entries.

Usage:

A web application hosted at https://custom.exampleapp.com contains the following iframe
<iframe src="https://digital-manufacturing-cloud-xxxxxx.test.execution.eu20.dmc.cloud.sap/cp.portal/site#Shell-home "></iframe>​

If embedding is not enabled for the login page of the identity provider the user has to login in a different browser tab first. 


Conclusion:

Embedding SAP Digital Manufacturing within custom web applications offers an additional way to extend its capabilities and integrate it seamlessly into existing workflows. However, it's crucial to consider security implications and adhere to best practices to ensure a safe and smooth integration experience.

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation Azure availability
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a timeline for when SAP Build Process Automation be available in Azure regions?

Thanks

John

entry.title: How to change alignments of heading or text of form in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on a requirement in SAP Build Process Automation where I need to change the alignment of heading and text in SAP BPA form, I need to change the alignment of heading to the middle of the form and text should be in the right side of the form.

I am not getting any solutions to change the alignment of heading and text  in the SAP BPA form.

could you please provide me any suggestion or any blog that can help me resolve the issue.

Attaching a SAP BPA sample form screenshot for you reference.

Thanks,

Rupesh

Please help me ..

entry.title: UI Integration card preview - 404 error for destinations
entry.content:
Hi guys,

I have been recently introduced to the world of UI Integration cards for SAP work zone and so far its been pretty easy to use. I have been trying to implement the Component UI Integration Card and whenever i try to preview the card, the destination (sapes5 devcenter) i'm trying to reach always returns with a 404. The setup is as follows below.

destination in btp

manifest.json

request from controller.js

network tab results

Appreciate any tips or hints as to where i might be missing some config or what im doing wrong here. Ive trawled through all the demo's and docs and cant seem to find anything as to why this is happening.

Cheers,

Steve

entry.title: SAP CAP Report List Page - How to trigger GO button in the codes?
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I have an CAP application, and I have implemented the following logic by it:
1. on the list report page, enter some Filters: a,b,c, then click "GO" button
2. based on filters that I entered, I call an external service to retrieve some data and then write these data to CAP temp database during the test
3. Now I got issue, after clicking "GO" button on step 1, step 2 will be implemented and data will be stored successfully, BUT not displayed immediately on the UI list. If I click "GO" button again, these stored new data will be displayed. So, in total, I have to click "GO" button twice to refresh and display the data. 

Some of my ideas are: a) resend the ODATA Batch request to the server (as I see every time I click "GO", a batch request will be sent.) I have tried this with basic auth (my SID and password), but always get 401, have no idea how to deal with this. 
b) auto refresh the page or rebind the table after clicking go and storing the data, I have tried with extension API on controller, but it did not work. 

So I would like to ask if there are some solutions for this. 

Thanks!

entry.title: Cloud Integration suite to connect external custom website and HANA on Cloud
entry.content:
Dear experts,

  We have cloud integration suite (CPI) + HANA on cloud licenses on public BTP cloud and external custom website with Django backend with APIs. 

We would like to know what will be the right approach to consume data from website and save it to HANA DB (Cloud) and vice-a-versa using Cloud Integration suite. Any tips, help, reading material references would be appreciated for further understanding.

Regards,

PD

entry.title: How to Use Fiori Element App in User task in BTP workflow
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

Is it possible to use Fiori Element Application as a Custom UI in User task in BTP workflow ? We are trying to show a "Form Entry Object page" based on Odata V4 as a custom task .it loads the component as such, but nothing gets displayed on the screen 

@Archana : Found a similar old post 

which says its not supported. is there any new update on this ?

entry.title: Subscription/Unsubscription Failed for SAP BPA within BTP free trial
entry.content:
Hi,

I've been trying to get access to SAP BPA in the BTP cockpit free trial but keep getting subscription failed. When attempting to delete it to retry, I get unsubscription failed as well. This has persisted for nearly a week now. Any help would be appreciated!

entry.title: BTP UI5 Application Connecting to on-premise SAP OData service
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have requirement to development an UI5 Application that retrieve/post data to On-Premise SAP system using OData Services(through Cloud Connector). Here BTP UI5 application users are not exist in SAP On-premise system. 

So, we need to use Basic Authentication to connect with SAP System using Technical user. Is this a good practice use basic authentication or do we have any other option setup connectivity with OAuth or any other best practice follow here.

Please suggest.

Regards,

Satya

entry.title: Assistance Needed: SAP Cloud Connector Connectivity Issue
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I have been working on an integration between SAP ECC (On-premise) and a third-party application. As part of the on-premise integration, we aim to utilize the Cloud Connector to establish a secure connection between the SAP system and the SAP BTP Subaccount. To achieve this, we configured the Cloud Connector on our client VM machine (Windows) and connected it to the SAP BTP Subaccount by whitelisting the IPs as outlined in the SAP Official Documentation.

Recently, we encountered an issue with the Cloud Connector's connectivity to the SAP BTP Account. Upon investigation, we discovered that the IP addresses in the AWS region associated with our SAP BTP Subaccount had been updated. The documentation suggested that these updates might take effect later in Quarter Q1. Consequently, we whitelisted these new IPs in our client system. However, despite this effort, we continue to face network connection issues between the SAP BTP and the Cloud Connector.

Error:

Failed to resolve 'connectivitynotification.cf.ap10.hana.ondemand.com' [A(1)]

For reference, the SAP Cloud Connector Document can be found here: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/prerequisites#loioe23f776e4d594fdbaeeb1196d47bbcc0__cf

The AWS region we are utilizing is Australia (Sydney) - AWS (cf.ap10.hana.ondemand.com).

Subsequently, we opted to grant full access to all IPs without restrictions. This led to successful connection establishment. However, when we reverted to providing access only to the mentioned IP addresses of the AWS region, the connection issue resurfaced.

Could you please assist me in understanding and resolving this issue? Your guidance will be immensely valuable in identifying the root cause.

Thank you.

Prathish.

SAP Business Technology Platform 

Cloud Connector 

SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: Problem in deleting the role in SAP btp cockpit
entry.content: Hi Team, I am getting a error in deletion the roles in btp cockpit and also facing problem in assigning the other roles. I am attaching the screenshot below for your reference.

entry.title: Are there any use cases or can any documentation be provided on winshuttle vs BTP RPA Bots?
entry.content: I currently use Winshuttle scripts to automate SAP transactions. Some are easy like changing a material description while others are very complex, utilizing multiple scripts. I'm interested in how BTP RPA could compare.

entry.title: How to solve the 'SHELLEXEC' error?
entry.content:
Hola,
Tengo el siguiente error: FALLÓ BAJO EL SIGUIENTE ERROR: irpa_core.verbExec 'SHELLEXEC': TypeError Lancement Process cmd, 8 No hay suficiente almacenamiento disponible para procesar este comando.
Por favor si me pueden ayudar con una solución.

entry.title: How to solve the 'SHELLEXEC' error?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have the following error: FAILED UNDER THE FOLLOWING ERROR: irpa_core.verbExec 'SHELLEXEC': TypeError Lancement process cmd, 8 Not enough storage is available to process this command.

Please if you can help me with a solution.

entry.title: SAP Asset Manager 2110 - Custom EntitySet - missing in POST Request from client
entry.content:
Hello, I have an identical problem to

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/sap-asset-manager-2110-custom-entityset-not-accessible-from-application/qaq-p/12587646

  • The EntitySets are present in the $metadata
  • The EntitySets are reachable from SAP MobileServices ("oData Application Destination Test DEST_SAM2110_PPROP)
  • The EntitySets are reachable from SAPGateway Client
  • The EntitySets were added to the "Offline Configuration .ini" (both to "Define Request" and "Request Groups")

In my case:

  • I have added 1 custom column to a standard EntitySet => works OK.
  • I have created 1 custom EntitySet (oMDO) => these data are not available in the client application.

I can see the data of the custom EntitySet in BTP cockpit and SAPGateway Client. But in t-code "/o/IWFND/TRACES" when "/merp/sap_asset_manager_2110/$batch" is called, the custom EntitySet is missing in the Request. And because it is missing in the request, it also missing in the response from the server.

The accepted answer in that link is "activate oMDO in config panel -> component assignment -> user persona and switchable features". In my opinion, it does not make sense, but I activated the oMDO in all App. features too just to be sure. No change.

How can I add my custom EntitySet to batch Request from the mobile application? How mobile application is creating this request? Obviously, it is not 1:1 from "Offline Configuration.ini"
